issues_found: Page type is navigation_page — violates rule 5 (reject for homepage, navigation_page, listing_page, search_page)
Source contains no substantive FOMC content — only navigation links and search interface
No publication date provided on the page
Cannot verify relevance to market structure or macro catalysts without actual FOMC content
event_type correctly set to 'unknown' but source provides no specific event to classify
Insufficient for meaningful research archive entry — no transcripts, statements, minutes, or policy content present
human_review_reason: The record's self-assessment is accurate and complete. This is a clear reject based on rule 5 (navigation_page) and rule 6 (thin, non-archiveable source). The generated record correctly identified all issues.

corrected_fields.summary: This is a Federal Reserve website navigation/index page that provides access to FOMC historical materials through search and year-based browsing. The page itself contains no specific FOMC transcripts, meeting minutes, rate decisions, or substantive policy content. It merely serves as a portal linking to various Federal Reserve sections including monetary policy, supervision, financial stability, payment systems, and economic research.
corrected_fields.why_it_matters: This source cannot serve as an archiveable record for market structure or macro catalysts research. It is a web navigation interface that merely provides access pathways to historical FOMC documents. Researchers seeking FOMC transcripts, statements, or minutes must use the linked search tools and select specific years/meetings to retrieve actual content.
